column1: # Dataset 6 — Food delivery orders for a mid-size restaurant chain
# - Payday boost: +13 on the 1st and the 15th of each month
# - "Free Delivery Tuesdays" promo: +20 every Tuesday from Feb 17 to May 12
# - Heatwave: +17/day from Jun 15 to Jun 24 (10-day stretch)
# Note: May 4 (Monday) is missing from the history — real-world data gap.
